title: campanula sibirica subsp. paniculata
intro: Campanula sibirica subsp. paniculata, also known as Siberian bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the bellflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Campanula sibirica subsp. paniculata can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use is not well-documented and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
